amount_suffix_tips: ⚠️ The system adds a unique suffix to the order amount automatically. Please pay the full exact amount, otherwise the payment cannot be credited.
hide_keyboard_tips: Keyboard hidden. Send /start to show it again.
insufficient_balance_tips:
⚠️ Insufficient balance. Please top up first.
➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖
placeholder_array_size_warning:
The TRON network is currently unstable, which may cause transaction delays or failures.
To protect user funds, the TRON deposit channel is temporarily disabled and will reopen after the network becomes stable again.

✅ Other features such as alerts, checks, and package services remain available.

Suggestion:
If you need to deposit, please try again in 10 minutes.
We are closely monitoring the TRON network status. Sorry for the inconvenience.
purchase_topup: ⚠️↓↓ Please pay the exact amount below, otherwise it cannot be credited ↓↓ --------------------------------- 🔸User: @{username} 🔸Mobile Number: {mobile} 🔸Amount: {amount} USDT 🔸Receiving Address: {address} (tap address to copy) --------------------------------- ‼️ Please double-check the decimal suffix in the payment amount.
successfully_purchased_order: ✅ Successfully purchased {amount} USDT worth of top-up or data. Please wait patiently while we process the recharge. If you have any questions, contact support {support}
topup_country_prompt_data:
Please select a data top-up country{work_time_line}
📌1. Data packages are not standardized and validity varies by country.
📌2. If you encounter any issues, please contact support immediately.
📌3. Final rules are subject to support explanation.
topup_mobile_input_prompt_data: Please enter {country} carrier + mobile number (e.g. Carrier +86138123456789):

topup_mobile_saved_prompt_topup: Tap a number below to top up, or re-enter {country} carrier + mobile number (e.g. Carrier +86138123456789):
